nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Admin-gated. Manage avatar broadcast queue (avatar_content_library rows). Body: { action: 'list'|'schedule'|'cancel', avatar_name?, content_topic_id?, scheduled_for?, intended_platforms?, library_id?, notes? }.

parameters.url: ={{ (function(){ var allOf=function(name){ try{ var items=$(name).all().map(function(i){return i.json;}); if(items.length===1 && Array.isArray(items[0])) return items[0]; if(items.length===1 && items[0] && items[0].id) return [items[0]]; return items.filter(function(x){return x && x.id;}); }catch(e){return [];} }; var avs=allOf('Lookup Avatar'); if(avs.length===0) return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/avatar_content_library?id=eq.00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'; var x=$('Check Admin').item.json; var qs=['avatar_id=eq.'+avs[0].id, 'select=id,avatar_id,content_topic_id,content_video_id,status,intended_platforms,scheduled_for,published_at,notes,created_at,updated_at,content_topics(id,topic_title,topic_description,priority_score,status,vertical)', 'order=scheduled_for.asc.nullsfirst', 'limit=200']; if(x.status_filter) qs.push('status=eq.'+encodeURIComponent(x.status_filter)); return 'https://zqwatouqmqgkmaslydbr.supabase.co/rest/v1/avatar_content_library?' + qs.join('&'); })() }}
